title: phymatosorus alatus
intro: Phymatosorus alatus, also known as the climbing fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phymatosorus alatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various digestive issues. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional remedies in the form of powders or tinctures.
